thinking.text:
The user wants me to look into the WeWork transaction (txn_fa793baabcf4) on the Business Bronze Rewards Card. According to the knowledge base:

- Business Bronze Rewards Card earns 1% cash back on eligible purchases.
- The WeWork transaction was on 10/21/2025, $380.61 in the "Other" category.
- It received 0 points, which seems wrong.

Let me search the knowledge base more specifically about the Business Bronze Rewards Card to see if there are any details about what counts as an eligible purchase or any exclusions.

Actually, let me look at the Business Bronze Rewards Card info more carefully from what I already found. Document #7 says "You earn 1.0% cash back on eligible purchases charged to your account." It doesn't specify any exclusions.

Let me search for more info about the Business Bronze Rewards Card specifically.

tool_calls.Name: KB_search
tool_calls.Arguments: {"query": "Business Bronze Rewards Card eligible purchases exclusions"}
